records.question: Which colleges with at most 18000 enrolled students have players who participated in tryouts?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT college.cname FROM college
JOIN tryout ON college.cname = tryout.cname
JOIN player ON tryout.pid = player.pid
WHERE college.enr <= 18000
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.cName FROM College AS T1 JOIN Tryout AS T2 ON T1.cName = T2.cName WHERE T1.enr <= 18000

records.question: Which colleges with at least 19000 enrolled have players named Blake who are strikers with no yellow cards, accepted tryouts, and high school scores of at most 1600?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT college.cname FROM college
JOIN tryout ON college.cname = tryout.cname
JOIN player ON tryout.pid = player.pid
WHERE player.ycard = 'no' AND player.pname = 'Blake' AND tryout.ppos = 'striker' AND college.enr >= 19000 AND tryout.decision = 'yes' AND player.hs <= 1600
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT T1.cName
FROM College AS T1
INNER JOIN Tryout AS T2
  ON T1.cName = T2.cName
INNER JOIN Player AS T3
  ON T2.pID = T3.pID
WHERE
  T1.enr >= 19000 AND
  T3.pName = 'Blake' AND
  T2.pPos = 'striker' AND
  T3.yCard = 'N' AND
  T2.decision = 'Yes' AND
  T3.HS <= 1600

records.question: Which colleges with an enrollment of at least 22000 have tryouts featuring players named Charles who have a ycard status of no?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT college.cname FROM college
JOIN tryout ON college.cname = tryout.cname
JOIN player ON tryout.pid = player.pid
WHERE player.pname = 'Charles' AND player.ycard = 'no' AND college.enr >= 22000
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT T1.cName
FROM College AS T1
INNER JOIN Tryout AS T2
  ON T1.cName = T2.cName
INNER JOIN Player AS T3
  ON T2.pID = T3.pID
WHERE
  T1.enr >= 22000 AND T3.pName = 'Charles' AND T3.yCard = 'no'
